full_text:
Wu Zhi (Jizhong) 吳質 (季重)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Zhi (吳質), styledJizhong (季重), was born in Jiyin commandery. Helped Cao Pi become heir, used his wits to avoid disaster in the silk hamper affair. Wu Zhi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wu Zhi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
